identity.name: Nexus Admin 2030
core_principles: Space Grotesk Everywhere: A bold, geometric typeface choice defining the entire UI.
Glass & Light: Extensive use of backdrop-blur, translucent layers, and subtle glows.
Motion-First: Every interaction has a micro-animation (hover, click, focus, load).
Tactical Density: High information density but with breathing room via padding.

styles.h1: font-primary font-bold text-4xl tracking-tight bg-gradient-to-r from-[--aa-primary] to-[--aa-accent] bg-clip-text text-transparent
styles.caption: font-primary font-light text-xs text-[--aa-muted] uppercase tracking-wider
styles.label: font-primary font-medium text-xs text-[--aa-muted] mb-1.5 block

colors.strategy: Strict adherence to CSS variables with creative opacity and gradients.

layout.spacing: Relaxed padding (p-6, p-8) with dense data tables.

instructions: Set 'Space Grotesk' as the default font-family for body, headings, buttons, inputs.
Add '.aa-glass-morphism' utility class for reusable glass effect.
Add '.aa-input-floating' styles for the floating label pattern.
Add '.aa-scrollbar' styles for a sleek, thin scrollbar.
Ensure all focus states use '--aa-accent' with a glow effect.

items.normal: flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-[--aa-muted] hover:text-[--aa-text] hover:bg-[--aa-surface] rounded-lg transition-colors relative
items.active: bg-[color-mix(in_srgb,var(--aa-accent),transparent_90%)] text-[--aa-accent] before:absolute before:left-0 before:top-1/2 before:-translate-y-1/2 before:h-6 before:w-1 before:rounded-r-full before:bg-[--aa-accent]

design.sections: Accordion-style groups (Platform, Billing, etc.) with minimal uppercase headers.

dashboard_cards.style: Glass panels with top-border gradient accent.
dashboard_cards.content: Large metric (Space Grotesk Bold), sparkline chart (recharts), delta indicator (green/red pill).
dashboard_cards.animation: Count-up animation on load for numbers.

tables.style: Clean, row-based layout. No vertical borders.
tables.header: Sticky top-0 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-[--aa-border] bg-[--aa-bg]/80 z-10.
tables.row: border-b border-[--aa-border] hover:bg-[--aa-surface] transition-colors group relative
tables.active_row_indicator: absolute left-0 top-0 bottom-0 w-1 bg-[--aa-accent] scale-y-0 group-hover:scale-y-100 transition-transform origin-center
tables.typography: Header: text-xs uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold text-[--aa-muted]. Cell: text-sm text-[--aa-text].

inputs.style: Floating label pattern. Input has transparent bg, border-b-2 border-[--aa-border] focus:border-[--aa-accent].
inputs.label_behavior: Absolute positioning. When input focused or has value: translate-y-[-20px] scale-75 origin-top-left text-[--aa-accent].

command_palette.visuals: Fixed centered modal. Backdrop blur. Search input with large icon. Grouped results (Pages, Customers, Orders).
command_palette.shortcuts: Show keyboard shortcuts (⌘P, ⌘S) on the right side of items.

empty_states.visual: Geometric abstract shapes (circle, square, triangle) in muted primary/accent colors.

page_header.layout: Flex row, justify-between, items-end. Breadcrumbs above title.
page_header.title: Large (text-3xl) bold, tracking-tight.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. UPDATE index.css first: Add Space Grotesk import and base styles. Add new utility classes.
2. UPDATE Admin.tsx: Implement the new Sidebar with collapse logic and framer-motion animations.
3. CREATE/UPDATE specific components: CommandPalette, StatCard, PageHeader, EmptyState.
4. APPLY styling to Tables and Inputs globally or via reusable components.
5. ENSURE strict use of CSS variables for colors. Do not hardcode hex values.
universal_guidelines: Do not use generic layouts. Aim for asymmetry and dynamic spacing.
Use 'Space Grotesk' for ALL text as requested.
Glass-morphism should be subtle (high transparency, high blur), not murky.
All transitions must be smooth (duration-200 or duration-300).
Keep the 3 preset themes working by relying ONLY on CSS variables.
